text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've got a whodunit on our hands! Someone
stole Mejiro McQueen's pudding during lunch
today!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But never fear, Detective Golshi's on the case!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
While I'm not exactly reassured by your presence,
I appreciate your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
First things first... The way things go, the one who
discovered the crime's usually the most sus,
sooo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why are you looking at me like that?! Besides,
the pudding is still missing, so no one has
"discovered" it yet!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. This is all part of the detective
process. Anyway, do you have an alibi?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umm... No one was watching me, exactly, but I
was simply eating my lunch as I normally do...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And the pudding was accounted for when you sat
down?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I even opened the lid slightly to indicate it
was mine.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The lid?! Was it open halfway, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, but how would you know that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dun, dun, dun! I've cracked the case!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The only fiend capable of a heist like this...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Is master thief Golshi the Third! I stake my name
on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a flash, Gold Ship takes off faster than I've
ever seen her run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there, Gold Ship! Ugh, when did you
get so fast?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Speed is an indispensable part of a master thief's
arsenal! It's how she always makes her escape!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Argh! I'll get you next time, mark my words!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bwahahaha! You'll never catch me, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's form got remarkably sharp after that,
but very few know the real reason why...
